prompt: On this activity network, tap the activity that is NOT on the critical path.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><line x1='78' y1='62' x2='131' y2='62' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='131,62 123,58 123,66' fill='#B5462F'/><line x1='189' y1='62' x2='242' y2='62' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='2'/><polygon points='242,62 234,58 234,66' fill='#B5462F'/><line x1='64' y1='84' x2='150' y2='130' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.4'/><line x1='170' y1='130' x2='256' y2='84' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.4'/><rect x='20' y='40' width='58' height='44' rx='4' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='2'/><text x='49' y='67' fill='currentColor' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>A</text><rect x='131' y='40' width='58' height='44' rx='4' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='2'/><text x='160' y='67' fill='currentColor' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>B</text><rect x='242' y='40' width='58' height='44' rx='4' stroke='#B5462F' stroke-width='2'/><text x='271' y='67' fill='currentColor' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>D</text><rect x='131' y='130' width='58' height='44' rx='4' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.4'/><text x='160' y='157' fill='currentColor' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>C</text><text x='160' y='192' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>path A-B-D = 12 days; path A-C-D = 9 days</text></svg>
figure.caption: Activity-on-node network; the red path is the longest.

regions.label: A
regions.why: On the critical path (A-B-D, 12 days) — zero float.

regions.label: B
regions.why: On the critical path — zero float.

regions.label: D
regions.why: On the critical path — zero float.

regions.label: C
regions.why: Path A-C-D is only 9 days, so C has 3 days of float and is off the critical path.

explanation: The critical path is the longest path through the network (A-B-D = 12 days), and its activities have zero float. C sits on the shorter A-C-D path (9 days), so it has float and is not critical.

prompt: On this probability-and-impact matrix, tap the cell for the highest-priority risk.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 205' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><rect x='70' y='30' width='60' height='46' fill='#C98A1F' fill-opacity='0.35' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='130' y='30' width='60' height='46' fill='#B5462F' fill-opacity='0.38' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='190' y='30' width='60' height='46' fill='#B5462F' fill-opacity='0.45' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='70' y='76' width='60' height='46' fill='#2F6F5E' fill-opacity='0.32' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='130' y='76' width='60' height='46' fill='#C98A1F' fill-opacity='0.35' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='190' y='76' width='60' height='46' fill='#B5462F' fill-opacity='0.38' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='70' y='122' width='60' height='46' fill='#2F6F5E' fill-opacity='0.32' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='130' y='122' width='60' height='46' fill='#2F6F5E' fill-opacity='0.32' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><rect x='190' y='122' width='60' height='46' fill='#C98A1F' fill-opacity='0.35' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.5'/><text x='62' y='56' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='end'>High</text><text x='62' y='102' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='end'>Med</text><text x='62' y='148' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='end'>Low</text><text x='30' y='99' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' transform='rotate(-90 30 99)'>Probability</text><text x='100' y='185' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>Low</text><text x='160' y='185' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>Med</text><text x='220' y='185' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>High</text><text x='160' y='200' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Impact</text></svg>
figure.caption: Probability up the side, impact across the bottom.

regions.label: High / High
regions.why: Highest probability and highest impact — the top-priority risk that needs a response now.

regions.label: High prob / Low impact
regions.why: Likely but minor — not the highest priority.

regions.label: Med / Med
regions.why: Mid-priority.

regions.label: Low / Low
regions.why: Lowest priority — a watch-list risk.

explanation: Risk priority rises with probability multiplied by impact, so the top-right (high probability, high impact) cell is the highest priority and demands an immediate response; the bottom-left is a watch-list item.

prompt: Cause and effect are only clear in hindsight, so the team must run safe-to-fail experiments. Tap the matching Cynefin domain.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 205' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><rect x='20' y='16' width='140' height='88' fill='#2F6F5E' fill-opacity='0.13' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.8'/><rect x='160' y='16' width='140' height='88' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.13' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.8'/><rect x='20' y='104' width='140' height='88' fill='#B5462F' fill-opacity='0.13' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.8'/><rect x='160' y='104' width='140' height='88' fill='#C98A1F' fill-opacity='0.13' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.8'/><text x='90' y='56' fill='currentColor' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Complex</text><text x='90' y='72' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>probe-sense-respond</text><text x='230' y='56' fill='currentColor' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Complicated</text><text x='230' y='72' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>sense-analyse-respond</text><text x='90' y='148' fill='currentColor' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Chaotic</text><text x='90' y='164' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>act-sense-respond</text><text x='230' y='148' fill='currentColor' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Clear</text><text x='230' y='164' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>sense-categorise-respond</text></svg>
figure.caption: The Cynefin domains.

regions.label: Complex
regions.why: Cause and effect are only clear in retrospect; probe with safe-to-fail experiments, sense, then respond.

regions.label: Complicated
regions.why: Knowable with expertise — analyse and apply good practice; not emergent.

regions.label: Chaotic
regions.why: No discernible cause and effect — act first to establish order.

regions.label: Clear
regions.why: Obvious cause and effect — apply known best practice.

explanation: In the Complex domain, cause and effect are only clear in hindsight, so the right approach is probe-sense-respond: run safe-to-fail experiments and let practice emerge. This is the agile/adaptive zone.

prompt: A stakeholder has HIGH power but LOW interest in the project. Tap the quadrant that shows how to engage them.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 205' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><line x1='44' y1='16' x2='44' y2='172' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='44' y1='172' x2='306' y2='172' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='175' y1='16' x2='175' y2='172' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.7' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><line x1='44' y1='94' x2='306' y2='94' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='0.7' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><text x='109' y='58' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Keep Satisfied</text><text x='240' y='58' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Manage Closely</text><text x='109' y='136' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Monitor</text><text x='240' y='136' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Keep Informed</text><text x='26' y='94' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' transform='rotate(-90 26 94)'>Power</text><text x='175' y='196' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>Interest</text></svg>
figure.caption: The Power/Interest grid.

regions.label: Keep Satisfied
regions.why: High power, low interest — give enough attention to keep them on side without overloading them.

regions.label: Manage Closely
regions.why: That is for HIGH power and HIGH interest.

regions.label: Monitor
regions.why: That is for LOW power and LOW interest.

regions.label: Keep Informed
regions.why: That is for LOW power and HIGH interest.

explanation: On the Power/Interest grid, a high-power but low-interest stakeholder sits top-left: keep them satisfied — enough engagement that they do not become a blocker, without the heavy involvement reserved for the high-interest 'manage closely' group.

prompt: Tap the milestone on this Gantt chart.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 175' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><line x1='86' y1='16' x2='86' y2='160' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1'/><text x='10' y='39' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Design</text><text x='10' y='67' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Build</text><text x='10' y='95' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Test</text><text x='10' y='123' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Deploy</text><rect x='88' y='28' width='80' height='14' rx='3' fill='#1F5FA8'/><rect x='150' y='56' width='96' height='14' rx='3' fill='#1F5FA8'/><rect x='196' y='84' width='70' height='14' rx='3' fill='#1F5FA8'/><rect x='240' y='112' width='52' height='14' rx='3' fill='#1F5FA8'/><polygon points='292,140 300,148 292,156 284,148' fill='#B5462F'/><text x='278' y='151' fill='#B5462F' font-size='9' text-anchor='end'>Go-live</text></svg>
figure.caption: A Gantt chart with task bars and a milestone.

regions.label: Milestone
regions.why: A milestone is a significant zero-duration point, drawn as a diamond — not a bar.

regions.label: Design bar
regions.why: A task bar has duration (a span), so it is not a milestone.

regions.label: Build bar
regions.why: A task bar, not a milestone.

regions.label: Deploy bar
regions.why: A task bar, not a milestone.

explanation: A milestone marks a significant moment (such as go-live or an approval) and has zero duration, so it is shown as a diamond rather than a bar.

prompt: In the DMAIC cycle, tap the stage where you lock in the improvement so the gains hold over time.

figure.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 110' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none'><circle cx='34' cy='44' r='18' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.12' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='34' y='49' fill='currentColor' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>D</text><text x='34' y='82' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>Define</text><circle cx='98' cy='44' r='18' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.12' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='98' y='49' fill='currentColor' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>M</text><text x='98' y='82' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>Measure</text><circle cx='162' cy='44' r='18' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.12' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='162' y='49' fill='currentColor' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>A</text><text x='162' y='82' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>Analyse</text><circle cx='226' cy='44' r='18' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.12' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='226' y='49' fill='currentColor' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>I</text><text x='226' y='82' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>Improve</text><circle cx='290' cy='44' r='18' fill='#1F5FA8' fill-opacity='0.12' stroke='#1F5FA8' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='290' y='49' fill='currentColor' font-size='13' text-anchor='middle'>C</text><text x='290' y='82' fill='currentColor' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>Control</text><line x1='54' y1='44' x2='76' y2='44' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='80,44 72,40 72,48' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='118' y1='44' x2='140' y2='44' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='144,44 136,40 136,48' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='182' y1='44' x2='204' y2='44' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='208,44 200,40 200,48' fill='currentColor'/><line x1='246' y1='44' x2='268' y2='44' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='272,44 264,40 264,48' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
figure.caption: The DMAIC improvement cycle.

regions.label: Define
regions.why: Sets the problem and goals — the start, not where gains are sustained.

regions.label: Measure
regions.why: Establishes the baseline data.

regions.label: Analyse
regions.why: Finds the root cause.

regions.label: Improve
regions.why: Implements the fix — but does not yet ensure it holds.

regions.label: Control
regions.why: Control puts monitoring and standards in place so the improvement is sustained over time.

explanation: DMAIC ends with Control: once the improvement is made, you put monitoring, standard work, and control charts in place so the gains are sustained rather than drifting back.
